response.justification: Candidate is a strong senior full-stack engineer with 13+ years of experience, but the role is specifically for a C++ developer in industrial automation with secure SDL/IEC 62443 expertise. The resume shows only a brief stint writing C/C++ at National Instruments in 2014-2015; the vast majority of recent work is TypeScript/Node.js/DLang web and data systems. No evidence of industrial cybersecurity, IEC 62443, MQTT/Modbus/OPC UA, message brokers in C++, or industrial automation domain.
strengths: 13+ years of broad engineering experience including low-latency/high-throughput systems at Sociomantic
Solid software craftsmanship background — TDD, CI/CD, testing tooling, mentoring, and workshops
Some prior C/C++ exposure at National Instruments on an engineering measurement IDE
concerns: C++ experience is ~6 months from a decade ago; no recent hands-on C++/STL work
No demonstrated industrial cybersecurity, SDL, or IEC 62443 experience
No exposure to industrial protocols (MQTT, Modbus, OPC UA, IEC 61850/104, DNP 3.0) or industrial automation domain

key_factors.factor: Strong general senior engineering and systems experience
